## Plugin reference

- Description: Input source sub-plugins for Sonata (MIDI, chord-grid, …).
- Sub-plugins:
  - **`midi`** — MIDI file input source for Sonata. Dropzone accepts .mid/.midi files; compile() parses them into a Score via @tonejs/midi.

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:END -->
